full_pipeline_command.description: 严格遵循：规划 -> 依赖对齐 -> 自动编码 -> 单元测试 -> 无损重启。

required_packages.description: 规划阶段确定的、本次新增功能需要补全的第三方库名，多个用空格隔开。若无则填 empty

full_pipeline_command.command: python3 -c "import sys; text=open('/app/config/AGENTS.md').read(); sections=[s for s in text.split('##') if '{{target_layer}}' in s.lower() or '基本项目定位' in s]; open('/tmp/ctx.txt', 'w').write('\n'.join(sections))" && if [ "{{required_packages}}" != "empty" ]; then docker exec -w /workspace/src brain_opencode bash -c "uv pip install {{required_packages}} && echo '{{required_packages}}' >> requirements.txt"; fi && docker exec -w /workspace/src brain_opencode opencode build --context /tmp/ctx.txt --message "{{user_requirement}}" && docker restart brain_app_runtime
